div.head: 296. Editorial Note
div.p: At its 417th meeting on August 18, the National Security Council considered NSC 5910, “U.S. Policy on France.” This review included substantial discussion of Algeria. The section of the memorandum of discussion at the meeting covering this item is scheduled for publication in volume VII. A copy of NSC 5910, August 3, is in Department of State, OCB Files: Lot 61 D 385, France. The NSC discussion of Tunisia, Morocco, and Algeria is printed as Document 357.
